title: The Creator Suite
description: A curated utility+FPS boost modpack for Minecraft content creators. Includes tools for cinematic recording, advanced building, schematic management, and performance optimization. Everything you need to create, build, and film — nothing you don't.
body:
# 🎬 📊  The Creator Suit
### The ultimate utility modpack for Minecraft content creators.

Whether you're filming cinematic timelapses, building massive structures, or just want 
a clean and powerful toolkit — this pack has everything a creator needs with massive FPS boost, 
carefully curated and optimized for **Fabric 1.21.1**.

---

## ✨ What's Included

### 🎬 Recording & Cinematics
- **Replay Mod** — Record your sessions and create stunning cinematic shots

### 🏗️ Building & Schematics
- **Litematica** — Load and follow schematics in-game

### 🌄 Visuals & Performance
- **Sodium** — Massive FPS boost, essential for recording
- **Iris Shaders** — Beautiful shader support for cinematic shots
- **[Voxy](https://modrinth.com/project/fxxUqruK)** — Huge render distances with minimal performance cost

### 🗺️ Map & Navigation
- **Xaero's Minimap** — Clean, lightweight minimap

### 📦 Inventory & QoL
- **Mouse Tweaks** — Smarter mouse controls for inventory
- **AppleSkin** — See hunger and saturation values

---

## ⚙️ Requirements
- **Mod Loader:** Fabric
- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.1
- **Fabric API:** Required (included)

---

## 🙌 Who is this for?
- Minecraft **YouTubers & streamers**
- **Builders** who want powerful schematic tools
- **Filmmakers** using Replay Mod for cinematic content
- Anyone who wants a **clean, no-bloat** creator toolkit

---

> 💡 *All mods are legal, publicly available, and safe for use on most servers.(check on rules for replay mod and litemaatica mod)*
